scenarios.description: valueOf with preserveTagCase=true and mismatched case triggers clone branch and tagName update
scenarios.precondition: static Tags initialized with html 'p' in lower-case
scenarios.expectedResult: returns a new Tag clone with tagName 'P' and formSubmit=false
pseudocode: Tag result = Tag.valueOf(in, normal, ns, settings);

scenarios.description: valueOf with existing tagName match but namespace mismatch falls through to creation branch
scenarios.precondition: static Tags contains 'div' in html namespace only
scenarios.expectedResult: returns new Tag for 'div' in custom namespace with formSubmit=false
pseudocode: Tag result = Tag.valueOf(in, normal, ns, settings);

scenarios.description: valueOf returns predefined MathML tag without creation when namespace matches MathML entry
scenarios.precondition: static Tags contains 'math' with namespace MathML
scenarios.expectedResult: returns existing Tag instance for 'math' in MathML namespace
pseudocode: Tag first = Tag.valueOf(in, normal, ns, settings);
Tag second = Tag.valueOf(in, normal, ns, settings);

scenarios.description: valueOf with unknown tagName and default html namespace returns new tag and isFormSubmittable=false
scenarios.expectedResult: returns new Tag for 'newTag' in html namespace, formSubmit=false
